content: The intrinsic curiosity module (ICM) that drives autonomous agent exploration can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for long-term memory in state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents. This creates a self-sustaining memory cycle where an agent automatically retains only the information that sparks its intrinsic learning curiosity, rather than relying on static hand-engineered retention rules.
